rationale: Iran deal diplomacy continues without new escalation near Romania; Black Sea situation unchanged; indirect energy market benefit persists but fades.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran strikes, claims deal near
top_events.summary: Continuation of last cycle; Iran cautious, no deal finalized. Mild positive for energy prices indirectly benefits Romania but no structural shift.

top_events.title: Indian sailors killed in Hormuz amid US-Iran ceasefire talks
top_events.summary: Ongoing danger in Hormuz Strait; relevant to energy shipping but no direct Romania impact.

top_events.title: Sudan drone strike on funeral procession
top_events.summary: Deadly attack in Sudan; geographically distant, no direct impact on Romania.
